testcases.input: nums = [2,5,9] Output: 10 Explanation: floor(2 / 5) = floor(2 / 9) = floor(5 / 9) = 0 floor(2 / 2) = floor(5 / 5) = floor(9 / 9) = 1 floor(5 / 2) = 2 floor(9 / 2) = 4 floor(9 / 5) = 1 We calculate the floor of the division for every pair of indices in the array then sum them up.
